about.title: About Me
about.text: Final-year Software Engineering student at Algebra Bernays University. During my internship, I worked with Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, React, and Docker, and participated in deployment processes. I am familiar with working in agile teams (Scrum, Kanban) and am currently expanding my knowledge of servers, Nginx configuration, and web security.

items.desc: During the internship, I worked on web application development using modern development tools and processes:
bullets: Participating in deployment and testing processes
Introduction to DevOps fundamentals (CI/CD, servers, deployment)
Working in an agile environment (Scrum, Kanban)

projects.title: Projects
projects.desc: During my studies, I worked on several projects including:
items: Desktop application development in Java and C#
Algorithm and data structure implementation in C++
Database work with complex SQL queries
